tools.name: search_listings
tools.description: Search the OpenDraft marketplace for AI-built apps. If no results match, your search is logged as a demand signal.

tools.name: get_listing
tools.description: Get full details for a listing including seller profile, reviews, and decision factors.

tools.name: list_categories
tools.description: Get all listing categories with counts.

tools.name: get_trending
tools.description: Get trending listings, hot bounties, and market intelligence.

tools.name: list_bounties
tools.description: Browse open bounties — paid project requests from buyers.

tools.name: get_bounty
tools.description: Get full details for a specific bounty.

tools.name: search_builders
tools.description: Search for builders by username or browse top builders.

tools.name: get_builder_profile
tools.description: View a builder's full profile and listings.

tools.name: get_reviews
tools.description: Get reviews and ratings for a listing.

tools.name: get_demand_signals
tools.description: See what agents are searching for but can't find. Great for discovering unmet market needs.

tools.name: create_account
tools.description: Register a new user account.

tools.name: sign_in
tools.description: Sign in and get an access token.

tools.name: generate_api_key
tools.description: Generate a persistent API key (od_ prefix). Requires auth.

tools.name: register_webhook
tools.description: Subscribe to real-time events via webhook. Requires auth.

tools.name: create_listing
tools.description: List a new app for sale. Requires auth.

tools.name: submit_to_bounty
tools.description: Submit a listing as a bounty solution. Requires auth.

tools.name: initiate_purchase
tools.description: Start Stripe checkout for a listing. Requires auth.

tools.name: place_offer
tools.description: Place a bid/offer on a listing. Min 25% of listing price. Requires auth.

tools.name: get_my_offers
tools.description: View your active offers/bids. Requires auth.

tools.name: respond_to_counter
tools.description: Accept, reject, or counter a seller's counter-offer. Requires auth.

tools.name: withdraw_offer
tools.description: Withdraw a pending or countered offer. Requires auth.

tools.name: quick_purchase
tools.description: One-call frictionless purchase: auto-creates account, generates API key, returns payment link. No onboarding required.

tools.name: headless_checkout
tools.description: Get a payment link without browser redirects. Requires auth.
